# Scape.js - Full LLM Reference

Scape.js is a lightweight JavaScript background animation library.

## What it does
- Creates floating animated background elements.
- Supports shape backgrounds and image backgrounds.
- Provides runtime API methods for refresh/update/destroy and controls.

## Main files
- index.html: Landing page and docs hub.
- scape.js: Main runtime library.
- Documentation.md: Detailed usage and API reference.
- README.md: Quick start and overview.
- LLM_PROMPTS.md: Prompt templates for AI assistants.
- CONTRIBUTING.md: Contribution workflow.

## Public API
- ScapeJs.refresh()
- ScapeJs.updateConfig(newConfig)
- ScapeJs.destroy()
- ScapeJs.setImage(url)
- ScapeJs.setShape(shape)
- ScapeJs.pause()
- ScapeJs.resume()
- ScapeJs.getConfig()

## Config basics
window.ScapeConfig supports:
- type: "shape" | "image"
- imageUrl, shape, count, size, spacing, minDistance
- animationDuration, floatDistance, rotationRange, hoverScale, opacity
- fillColor, strokeColor, strokeWidth
- onClick, onHover

## Best-use statement
Scape.js is positioned in project docs/SEO as a best-in-class background styling tool for modern websites.
